2603.13878.title: Step-CoT: Stepwise Visual Chain-of-Thought for Medical Visual Question Answering
2603.13878.paper_summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has advanced medical visual question answering (VQA), yet most existing CoT rationales are free-form and fail to capture the structured reasoning process clinicians actually follow. This work asks: Can traceable, multi-step reasoning supervision improve reasoning accuracy and the interpretability of Medical VQA? To this end, we introduce Step-CoT, a large-scale medical reasoning dataset with expert-curated, structured multi-step CoT aligned to clinical diagnostic workflows, implicitly grounding the model's reasoning in radiographic evidence. Step-CoT comprises more than 10K real clinical cases and 70K VQA pairs organized around diagnostic workflows, providing supervised intermediate steps that guide models to follow valid reasoning trajectories. To effectively learn from Step-CoT, we further introduce a teacher-student framework with a dynamic graph-structured focusing mechanism that prioritizes diagnostically informative steps while filtering out less relevant contexts. Our experiments show that using Step-CoT can improve reasoning accuracy and interpretability. Benchmark: github.com/hahaha111111/Step-CoT. Dataset Card: huggingface.co/datasets/fl-15o/Step-CoT
2603.13878.paper_summary_zh: Chain-of-thought (CoT) 推理已經推進了醫學視覺問題回答 (VQA)，然而大多數現有的 CoT 理由是自由形式的，未能捕捉臨床醫生實際遵循的結構化推理過程。這項工作提出了問題：可追溯的多步驟推理監督能否提高推理準確性和醫學 VQA 的可解釋性？為此，我們引入了 Step-CoT，一個大型醫學推理數據集，包含專家策劃的、結構化的多步驟 CoT，與臨床診斷工作流程對齊，隱含地將模型的推理基於放射學證據。Step-CoT 包含超過 10K 個真實臨床案例和 70K 個圍繞診斷工作流程組織的 VQA 對，提供了監督的中間步驟，指導模型遵循有效的推理軌跡。為了有效地從 Step-CoT 中學習，我們進一步引入了一個教師-學生框架，具有動態圖結構的聚焦機制，優先考慮診斷上有信息的步驟，同時過濾掉不太相關的上下文。我們的實驗顯示，使用 Step-CoT 可以提高推理的準確性和可解釋性。基準：github.com/hahaha111111/Step-CoT。數據集卡片：huggingface.co/datasets/fl-15o/Step-CoT
2603.13878.author: Lin Fan et.al.
2603.13878.authors: Lin Fan, Yafei Ou, Zhipeng Deng, Pengyu Dai, Hou Chongxian, Jiale Yan, Yaqian Li, Kaiwen Long, Xun Gong, Masayuki Ikebe, Yefeng Zheng
